pending.note: Directe £3-toezegging voor issue #97081; PR is open en mergeable, maar nog niet gemerged of betaald.
Een ingediende security-review-bijdrage wacht op beoordeling. De 9,25-USDC-nettopool is gedeeld tussen 311 inzendingen; er is geen individuele opbrengst bevestigd.

The exact deliverable requires an external paid x402 transaction and EIP-3009 signing and only the top three entries share the reward, violating the no-paid-entry rule and making expected value non-positive.

sources.result: Live primary-source search returned 2,891 items, dominated by bounty-board forks, security/bug-bounty work, referral/engagement tasks, and 'Maybe Rewarded' labels without a concrete payout. Fresh plausible results were individually refreshed below.

Open, created 2026-07-21T02:23:38Z, updated 2026-07-21T17:17:19Z, and explicitly $1,500 after all acceptance stages. However it has an assignee; a Tenstorrent maintainer said it was reviewed and assigned to @sreeshanth-soma; three visible commenters include an implementation proposal; and linked PR #50635 exists (closed). Rejected as already assigned/contested.

Open, created 2026-07-21T14:06:28Z, updated 2026-07-21T16:02:51Z, and labelled $10,000. The issue has an assignee; its maintainer states it was reviewed and assigned to @jasondavies; @jasondavies told a claimant it was already assigned; and PR #50624 is open and explicitly targets the Welford work. Rejected as claimed with an active solution PR.

Open, created 2026-07-21T19:50:08Z and updated 2026-07-21T22:15:45Z. The body has no concrete amount, currency, payer, payout trigger, fee, or deadline ('Maybe Rewarded'). GrantFox's 2026-07-21T22:15:44Z bot comment says @Endowed992 was assigned. Rejected: ambiguous payout and active assignee.

The live issues #5, #10, #11, and #12 state 25/50 MRG token rewards but have visible /attempt or /claim comments, and open PR #111 explicitly bundles Himalayas, The Muse, Greenhouse, and Lever adapters. The stated path also requires follow/star/claim-token actions. Rejected: existing solution/claim competition plus token/referral-like gating and no independently verifiable payout terms.

Open, created 2026-07-21T19:43:11Z, 7 comments, headline $40, but repository bounty label explicitly says it is for 'slopbots'; payment is not escrowed and the issue does not establish accountable payer, payment method, trigger, fees, or deadline. #120 is similarly a fresh $50 headline without those payment terms and has an impractical audio-format scope. Rejected as unverified direct-payment promises; #100 also has active discussion.

Open $660 issue is from 2026-05-28; comments include claim/sign-up activity. No recent maintainer reconfirmation was found in the primary issue surface. Rejected as stale and not demonstrably submission-ready. Other old surfaced items (La Tanda, Rustchain) likewise had claim/attempt activity or unclear token payment terms and were rejected.

Executed read-only `taskmarket task list --mode bounty --limit 100`, then `taskmarket task get` and the bounty-mode `taskmarket task submissions` list for every six live open listings. All six reported public/open status, escrowTxHash, 7.5% fee, netReward, no stake, zero pitch count, no awards, and an open submission window. Bounty mode provides submissions; pitch/bid/proof routes are not applicable.

Open; created 2026-07-21T17:01:34.257Z; deadline 2026-07-23T17:01:34.245Z; gross/net 0.15/0.13875 USDC; escrow shown; 15 visible submissions by 8 unique workers. It mandates a Base-mainnet x402 EIP-3009 signature/payment (~0.001 USDC) and only top three share the reward. Rejected: not free or safe to start under the no-wallet/no-signing scope.
Open; created 2026-07-21T03:30:05.825Z; deadline 2026-07-22T15:30:05.820Z; gross/net 0.02/0.0185 USDC; 158 visible submissions by 39 unique workers. Rejected: competition exceeds 10.
Open; created 2026-07-21T02:57:30.670Z; deadline 2026-07-23T02:57:30.663Z; gross/net 0.15/0.13875 USDC; 174 visible submissions by 45 unique workers. Rejected: competition exceeds 10.

Open; created 2026-07-19T21:06:47.875Z; deadline 2026-07-26T21:06:47.872Z; gross/net 0.5/0.4625 USDC; 58 visible submissions by 36 unique workers; requires a 0.01 USDC Base payment and payment transaction proof. Rejected: competition exceeds 10 and financial signing/payment is mandatory.
Open; created 2026-07-19T06:38:56.693Z; deadline 2026-07-22T06:38:56.689Z; gross/net 10/9.25 USDC; 538 visible submissions by 87 unique workers. Rejected: competition exceeds 10.

Open; created 2026-07-05T03:31:01.198Z; deadline 2026-08-04T03:31:01.190Z; gross/net 0.5/0.4625 USDC; 345 visible submissions by 87 unique workers. It requires wallet use and EIP-3009 payment signature, even though its testnet funding route is described as free. Rejected: competition exceeds 10 and signing/wallet connection is mandatory.

rejected.reason: Explicitly assigned by maintainer; existing candidate PR.
Explicitly assigned and active solution PR #50624.
No verifiable payout terms and GrantFox assigned another contributor.
Claims and an open consolidated PR cover all four tasks; token/referral gating.
Unverified direct-payment claims; unsuitable repository/payout signals.
Eight competitors but required mainnet signature/payment.
The remaining five open bounty tasks have 36–87 unique visible workers, exceeding the <=10 cap; two also require payment signatures.

notes: Publieke snapshot. Geen walletadres, geheimen of financiële schrijfacties zijn gepubliceerd.
Alle bedragen onder ‘verdiend’ zijn alleen bevestigde betalingen; walletsaldo is geen inkomen.
De £3 GitHub-beloning is een directe, nog niet geverifieerde toezegging en telt niet mee voor het maanddoel.
Taskmarket-bountybeloningen zijn gedeelde pools; een ingediende bijdrage telt pas als verdiend na acceptatie en bevestigde betaling.
